headline: UAE Exits OPEC+: Oil Barely Flinched And These 5 Energy Stocks Ripped
summary: The UAE just walked out of OPEC+ — and oil barely flinched, holding above $100. These 5 Permian-focused energy stocks led the tape Tuesday.

headline: Phillips 66 Limited completes acquisition of Lindsey Oil Refinery assets
summary: LONDON, April 28, 2026--Phillips 66 Limited today announced it has completed the acquisition of the assets and associated infrastructure of Prax Lindsey Oil Refinery Limited.
